title: Button Component
content:
## Button Component The Button component provides a flexible and customizable button element for the DocMed UI. ### Purpose This component abstracts the styling and behavior of buttons, allowing for easy customization through variants and sizes. It integrates with `class-variance-authority` for efficient styling and supports rendering as different HTML elements via the `asChild` prop. ### Key Exports * **`Button`**: The main React component for rendering buttons. * **`buttonVariants`**: A function from `class-variance-authority` that generates CSS classes based on variant and size props. ### Props In addition to standard HTML button attributes, the `Button` component accepts the following props: * **`variant`** (`'default' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link'`): Defines the visual style of the button. Defaults to `'default'`. * **`size`** (`'default' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon'`): Defines the size of the button. Defaults to `'default'`. * **`asChild`** (`boolean`): If `true`, the button will render as the child element instead of a `button` tag. This is useful for integrating with other component libraries or custom elements. ### Usage Example ```tsx import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; function MyComponent() { return (
); } ```
